title: [FIRRTL] (mux invalid) mismatch
body:
The following FIRRTL program

```python
; seed: 4352
circuit top_mod :
  module top_mod :
    input clock: Clock
    input inp_ab: SInt<43>
    input inp_db: UInt<16>
    output tmp73: SInt<43>
    reg tmp67: SInt<39>, clock
    tmp67 is invalid
    tmp73 <= mux(head(inp_db, 1), tmp67, inp_ab)
```

Compiled with `firtool   --lower-to-hw --infer-widths --imconstprop --lowering-options=disallowPackedArrays,emittedLineLength=8192 --mlir-timing --verilog -o=$VFILE2` produces this Verilog:

```verilog
module top_mod(	// a_top_mod.fir:3:10
  input         clock,
  input  [42:0] inp_ab,
  input  [15:0] inp_db,
  output [42:0] tmp73);

  assign tmp73 = inp_ab;	// a_top_mod.fir:3:10
endmodule
```

Compiled with `firrtl-1.5-SNAPSHOT` produces this Verilog:

```verilog
module top_mod(
  input         clock,
  input  [42:0] inp_ab,
  input  [15:0] inp_db,
  output [42:0] tmp73
);
  assign tmp73 = inp_db[15] ? $signed(43'sh0) : $signed(inp_ab);
endmodule
```

`Yosys 0.9+3911 (git sha1 4b31223e, clang 11.0.1 -fPIC -Os)` reports formal mismatch:

```
ERROR: Found 43 unproven $equiv cells in 'equiv_status -assert'.
```
